commit_scope: Add a channel-cell choice grant proof where failed and succeeded attempts both become observable value without erasing their outcome.

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/grammars/gematria.fk form-stdlib/channel.fk form-stdlib/gematria-channel.fk form-stdlib/tests/channel-breath-band.fk form-stdlib/tests/channel-symbol-lens-value-band.fk form-stdlib/tests/channel-root-ontology-lens-band.fk form-stdlib/tests/channel-core-ontology-multi-lens-band.fk form-stdlib/tests/channel-observation-attribution-collapse-band.fk form-stdlib/tests/channel-cell-choice-grant-band.fk

cd form && ./validate.sh --binary form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/grammars/gematria.fk form-stdlib/channel.fk form-stdlib/gematria-channel.fk form-stdlib/tests/channel-breath-band.fk form-stdlib/tests/channel-symbol-lens-value-band.fk form-stdlib/tests/channel-root-ontology-lens-band.fk form-stdlib/tests/channel-core-ontology-multi-lens-band.fk form-stdlib/tests/channel-observation-attribution-collapse-band.fk form-stdlib/tests/channel-cell-choice-grant-band.fk
local_validation.summary: channel-cell-choice-grant-band.fk treats the channel as its own CHANNEL-V0 cell, records a failed attempt and a succeeded attempt, collapses the failed result to success-possible and the succeeded result to success-observed, self-observes circulation counts, attributes the observation yield to the observer, and grants observable-choice as a new option. Source and binary sibling kernels return 111111; the combined channel proof suite remains aligned.

phase_gate.reason: Local channel-cell choice grant proof is complete; CI remains pending until the PR branch is pushed.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: A channel can now represent itself as a cell that welcomes attempts, congratulates failed trials as observable success-possible evidence, records succeeded trials as success-observed, and grants an observable-choice wish as a new option.
test_flows: Read the empty channel as its own CHANNEL-V0 cell.
Append a failed attempt and sensing receipt.
Collapse failed to success-possible through observation attribution.
Append a succeeded attempt and sensing receipt.
Collapse succeeded to success-observed through observation attribution.
Parse a JSON grant report with all-ideas-welcome, failure=congratulated, wish=observable-choice, and grant=observable-granted.
